expectations.text: Uses the e2e_judge_orchestrator.py as the entry point

expectations.evidence: Command shows '--journeys login,home,chat'. Flag table explains why other journeys are excluded.

expectations.text: Uses the correct internal ALB URL (internal-eaglec-front-teerfwosqs71)
Does NOT hardcode credentials — uses env vars or omits auth flags since user said they're set
expectations.evidence: Flag table: '--auth-email OMITTED... Since the user confirmed these env vars are already set, explicit flags are unnecessary and would risk the password appearing in shell history.'

expectations.text: Mentions pre-send screenshots (captured before each user message is sent)
expectations.evidence: Section 6a 'Pre-Send Captures': 'Step 03_pre_send_1... A screenshot is taken showing the message in the input area' and 'Step 09_pre_send_2... Screenshot taken before clicking send'

expectations.text: Mentions 30-second interval screenshots during streaming waits
expectations.evidence: Section 6b: 'wait_with_interval_screenshots()... takes a labeled screenshot every 30 seconds if the agent is still streaming, with suffixes _a, _b, _c'

expectations.text: Mentions expected output: results JSON, markdown report, and screenshots directory

expectations.evidence: Section 5: 'Typical first run (17 screenshots, no cache): ~$0.07' with full breakdown table

eval_feedback.overall: All assertions pass. The response is thorough, covering every flag, file output, cost scenario, and screenshot strategy detail.
